questions.question: Explain the basic concept of a process in the context of operating systems. How does it differ from a thread?
questions.hint: Process characteristics: resource allocation, memory allocation, execution environment

questions.question: What is the primary function of a process scheduler? Provide an example of a process scheduling algorithm.
questions.hint: Process scheduling algorithms: First-Come-First-Served, Shortest Job First, Priority Scheduling

questions.question: Describe the differences between a process creation and process termination in an operating system. Explain the system calls involved in these operations.
questions.hint: Process creation: fork, exec; Process termination: exit, wait
